# link11waap_mobile_application_group (Resource)

Manages a Mobile Application Group in Link11 WAAP.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Mobile Application Group Resource

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

resource "link11waap_mobile_application_group" "example" {
  config_id   = data.link11waap_config.main.id
  name        = "Example Mobile Application Group"
  description = "Mobile application group for example app"

  # Optional: UID header name for device identification
  uid_header = "X-Device-UID"

  # Optional: grace period value
  grace = "3600"

  # Active configuration entries
  active_config {
    active = true
    json   = "{\"test\": 123}"
    name   = "default-config"
  }

  # Application signatures
  signatures {
    active = true
    hash   = "596f75724d657373616765"
    name   = "example-signature"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) The configuration ID.
- `name` (String) The name of the mobile application group.

### Optional

- `active_config` (Block Set) Set of active configuration entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--active_config))
- `description` (String) Description of the mobile application group.
- `grace` (String) Grace period value.
- `signatures` (Block Set) Set of application signatures. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--signatures))
- `uid_header` (String) The UID header name for device identification.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the mobile application group.

<a id="nestedblock--active_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `active_config`

Required:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this configuration entry is active.
- `json` (String) JSON configuration string.
- `name` (String) Name of the configuration entry.


<a id="nestedblock--signatures"></a>
### Nested Schema for `signatures`

Required:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this signature is active.
- `hash` (String) Hash value of the signature.
- `name` (String) Name of the signature.
